tagger.description: Optional tagger information for the tag. If provided, this takes precedence over both system-level defaults and any optional, default authorship information configured in the `git-clone` step.

signingKey.description: The GPG signing key for the tagger. If provided, 'email' and 'name' must match the key's UID.

message.description: The annotation message for the tag.

tag.description: The tag to create in the repository.

path.description: The path to a working directory of a local repository.
